title: SGGU Godhra – Librarian, Assistant Professor and More – 820 Posts

basic_details.job_title: SGGU Godhra Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Apply Online for 820 Librarian, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: SGGU Godhra Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 820 new vacancies for Librarian, Assistant Professor and More posts. Candidates can apply online only from 01.05.2026 to 25.05.2026 through SGGU Godhra website sggu.ac.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Various Affiliated Self-Finance Colleges under Shri Govind Guru University
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via Samarth Portal through official SGGU website)

age_limit.age_details: After merit list preparation, candidates and college authorities are called to the university. Candidates are offered different college options based on merit. Appointment letter issued by the respective college on the same day.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc, BPEd, Any Post Graduate, M.Phil/Ph.D, M.Lib

selection_process: Online Application + Interview + Document Verification + Merit-based College Allocation
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Samarth Portal accessible via the official SGGU website at https://www.sggu.ac.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. A valid personal email ID and mobile number are mandatory, as all communications will be sent via email/SMS. Candidates must read the detailed advertisement carefully before filling in the application form.
seo_tags: Shri Govind Guru University Godhra Librarian
